machine.name: Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Behavioral Health Data Sharing
machine.description: Community-services machine for behavioral health data sharing in the behavioral health and crisis workstream. It monitors consent, privacy constraint, referral status, and care-team visibility and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

metadata.domain: Community Services - Behavioral Health And Crisis
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: consent, privacy constraint, referral status, and care-team visibility
metadata.upstreamMachine: Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Community Violence Trauma Support
downstreamMachines: Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Behavioral Crisis Executive
agentActions: Dispatch benefits_navigation_agent for urgent community-services intervention on behavioral health data sharing.
Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for behavioral health data sharing.
Create field work order or mobile team task for behavioral health data sharing.
Maintain monitored service path for behavioral health data sharing.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [1116:1120] feeds Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Behavioral Crisis Executive.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Data Sharing: WATCH -> URGENT_RESPONSE

metadata.description: Escalates resident or field risk into urgent response.

metadata.action: Dispatch benefits_navigation_agent for urgent community-services intervention on behavioral health data sharing.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Data Sharing: COORDINATION_NEEDED -> COORDINATE_SERVICES

metadata.action: Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for behavioral health data sharing.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Data Sharing: FIELD_TASK_NEEDED -> FIELD_WORK_ORDER

metadata.description: Creates a field crew, outreach, or mobile response task.

metadata.action: Create field work order or mobile team task for behavioral health data sharing.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Data Sharing: STABLE_PATH -> STABLE_SERVICE_PATH

metadata.description: Confirms resident service path is stable and monitored.

metadata.action: Maintain monitored service path for behavioral health data sharing.

inputSequences.name: Urgent response sequence

inputSequences.name: Coordinate services
